source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division — Postcards Collection
artist: The Photo Shop Studio (copyright on card)
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: Mt. Edgecumb, Sitka, Alaska
description: Snow-capped Mount Edgecumbe (3,201 ft), a dormant stratovolcano on Kruzof Island, viewed from Sitka across a lake with Tongass National Forest in the foreground. Card No. 13. The volcano's symmetric cone is one of the most recognizable landmarks of Southeast Alaska.
alt: Snow-capped Mount Edgecumbe volcano behind Tongass forest near Sitka, Alaska
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-12 — downloaded from tile.loc.gov and visually confirmed
